items.name: Crazy Color Black T with Pink Cross
items.description: Make a statement without saying a word. This bold black tee is stamped with Crazy Color’s iconic logo on the back and their signature pink cross on the front, serving rebellious energy and street-style edge. It’s the go-to look for dye-hards, rule-breakers and anyone repping colour with confidence.

items.name: Quetzal Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Legendary in Mayan and Aztec mythology, Quetzals are mostly found in South American forests and admired for their vibrant plumage and cute stature. This one keeps you company by perching on your shoulder - feed it and care for it well my friend.  ❤️

Get this UGC from Idle UGC Points here: https://www.roblox.com/games/93309764907209/Idle-UGC-Points
